originalTitle: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
summary: The Kane Parsons' film Backrooms is expected to earn up to $90 million in its opening weekend after pulling down $38 million on Friday alone. That's not only above expectations, but absolutely obliterates A24's previous opening weekend record of $25.5 million for Alex Garland's Civil War. It's also a better opening day than The Mandalorian […]
content: The Kane Parsons’ film Backrooms is expected to earn up to $90 million in its opening weekend after pulling down $38 million on Friday alone. That’s not only above expectations, but absolutely obliterates A24’s previous opening weekend record of $25.5 million for Alex Garland’s Civil War. It’s also a better opening day than The Mandalorian and Grogu, which only pulled down $33.7 million on its way to a total $81.6 million for the weekend. That also means that Backrooms is an incredibly profitable movie, with an estimated $10 million budget. By comparison, the latest Star Wars disappointment cost $165 million and was considered affordable compared to other entries in the series. While Backrooms hasn’t received quite as much universal praise as fellow low-budget horror breakout Obsession, it’s still largely getting positive reviews. It also adds to the growing number of YouTube creators (including Obsession’s Curry Barker) who have proven to be successful box office draws.
chineseTitle: 《幕后密室》是一部经过认证的大片，首映日票房 3800 万美元
chineseSummary: 凯恩·帕森斯 (Kane Parsons) 出品的影片《幕后室》(Backrooms) 预计首映周末票房将高达 9000 万美元，仅周五就票房收入达 3800 万美元。这不仅超出了预期，而且完全打破了 A24 此前因亚历克斯·加兰 (Alex Garland) 执导的《内战》而创下的 2550 万美元的首周末票房纪录。这也是比《曼达洛人》更好的开幕日 […]
chineseContent: 凯恩·帕森斯 (Kane Parsons) 的电影《幕后室》(Backrooms) 预计首映周末票房将高达 9000 万美元，仅周五就票房收入达 3800 万美元。这不仅超出了预期，还彻底打破了 A24 此前创下的亚历克斯·加兰 (Alex Garland) 执导的《内战》首周末票房 2550 万美元的纪录。这也是比《曼达洛人》和《格罗古》更好的首映日，后者仅在周末就减少了 3,370 万美元的票房，达到 8,160 万美元。这也意味着《幕后密室》是一部利润极高的电影，预计预算为 1000 万美元。相比之下，最新一部令人失望的《星球大战》耗资 1.65 亿美元，与该系列的其他作品相比，被认为是可以承受的。虽然《幕后密室》没有像其他低成本恐怖片《痴迷》那样获得普遍赞誉，但它仍然获得了大部分正面评价。它还增加了越来越多的 YouTube 创作者（包括 Obsession 的 Curry Barker），他们已被证明是成功的票房收入。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
